name: PdePayblRptCntrFLoad

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT PDE_PAYBL_RPT_CNTR_SK, FILE_ID, CNTR_SEQ_ID, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CMS_CNTR_ID, AS_OF_YR, AS_OF_MO, FILE_CRTN_DT, FILE_CRTN_TM, RPT_ID, DRUG_COV_STTUS_CD_TX, BNFCRY_CT, CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_BELOW_AMT/100 AS CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_BELOW_AMT, CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_ABOVE_AMT/100 AS CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_ABOVE_AMT, CUR_MO_TOT_GROS_DRUG_CST_AMT/100 AS CUR_MO_TOT_GROS_DRUG_CST_AMT, CUR_MO_LOW_INCM_CST_SHARING_AMT/100 AS CUR_MO_LOW_INCM_CST_SHARING_AMT, CUR_MO_COV_PLN_PD_AMT/100 AS CUR_MO_COV_PLN_PD_AMT, TOT_DTL_RCRD_CT, CUR_MO_SUBMT_DUE_AMT/100 AS CUR_MO_SUBMT_DUE_AMT, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.RPTCNTR_TMP_PdePayblRptCntrFLoad) MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PDE_PAYBL_RPT_CNTR_F AS T USING cte AS S ON (T.PDE_PAYBL_RPT_CNTR_SK = S.PDE_PAYBL_RPT_CNTR_SK) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.FILE_ID = S.FILE_ID, T.CNTR_SEQ_ID = S.CNTR_SEQ_ID, T.SRC_SYS_CD = S.SRC_SYS_CD, T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK = S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK = S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, T.CMS_CNTR_ID = S.CMS_CNTR_ID, T.AS_OF_YR = S.AS_OF_YR, T.AS_OF_MO = S.AS_OF_MO, T.FILE_CRTN_DT = S.FILE_CRTN_DT, T.FILE_CRTN_TM = S.FILE_CRTN_TM, T.RPT_ID = S.RPT_ID, T.DRUG_COV_STTUS_CD_TX = S.DRUG_COV_STTUS_CD_TX, T.BNFCRY_CT = S.BNFCRY_CT, T.CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_BELOW_AMT = S.CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_BELOW_AMT, T.CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_ABOVE_AMT = S.CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_ABOVE_AMT, T.CUR_MO_TOT_GROS_DRUG_CST_AMT = S.CUR_MO_TOT_GROS_DRUG_CST_AMT, T.CUR_MO_LOW_INCM_CST_SHARING_AMT = S.CUR_MO_LOW_INCM_CST_SHARING_AMT, T.CUR_MO_COV_PLN_PD_AMT = S.CUR_MO_COV_PLN_PD_AMT, T.TOT_DTL_RCRD_CT = S.TOT_DTL_RCRD_CT, T.CUR_MO_SUBMT_DUE_AMT = S.CUR_MO_SUBMT_DUE_AMT, T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (PDE_PAYBL_RPT_CNTR_SK, FILE_ID, CNTR_SEQ_ID, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CMS_CNTR_ID, AS_OF_YR, AS_OF_MO, FILE_CRTN_DT, FILE_CRTN_TM, RPT_ID, DRUG_COV_STTUS_CD_TX, BNFCRY_CT, CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_BELOW_AMT, CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_ABOVE_AMT, CUR_MO_TOT_GROS_DRUG_CST_AMT, CUR_MO_LOW_INCM_CST_SHARING_AMT, CUR_MO_COV_PLN_PD_AMT, TOT_DTL_RCRD_CT, CUR_MO_SUBMT_DUE_AMT, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) VALUES (S.PDE_PAYBL_RPT_CNTR_SK, S.FILE_ID, S.CNTR_SEQ_ID, S.SRC_SYS_CD, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, S.CMS_CNTR_ID, S.AS_OF_YR, S.AS_OF_MO, S.FILE_CRTN_DT, S.FILE_CRTN_TM, S.RPT_ID, S.DRUG_COV_STTUS_CD_TX, S.BNFCRY_CT, S.CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_BELOW_AMT, S.CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_ABOVE_AMT, S.CUR_MO_TOT_GROS_DRUG_CST_AMT, S.CUR_MO_LOW_INCM_CST_SHARING_AMT, S.CUR_MO_COV_PLN_PD_AMT, S.TOT_DTL_RCRD_CT, S.CUR_MO_SUBMT_DUE_AMT, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK)
